ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "listing_url" TEXT /* URL of the listing */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the listing */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., entire home/apt, private room) */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for booking */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who created the listing */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per night for the listing */,
  "cleaning_fee" REAL /* Cleaning fee per booking */,
  "extra_guest_fee" REAL /* Extra guest fee per night */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate for the listing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the listing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the listing was last updated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the listing location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the listing location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the listing */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the listing */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the listing */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the listing */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the listing */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "host_email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the host registered on the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the host's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the host */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Language(s) spoken by the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being booked */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the booking */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests made by the guest (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest */,
  "guest_email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the guest registered on the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the guest's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking associated with this payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the booking */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Transaction fee for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being reviewed */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who made the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the guest (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the guest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "accuracy_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for accuracy (1-5) */,
  "communication_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for communication (1-5) */,
  "cleanliness_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for cleanliness (1-5) */,
  "check_in_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for check-in (1-5) */,
  "value_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for value (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., host, guest, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (host or guest) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking that is being cancelled */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest requesting the cancellation */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cancellation was requested */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the cancellation (e.g., processed, denied) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Refund amount for the cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., booking confirmation, review request) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender (user or host) */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver (user or host) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the message (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., bookings, revenue, user growth) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
